title: Use a farm-then-react timeline instead of gambling
body: The default jungle timeline should stay simple: farm, react to information, then return to farming unless a high-value play is clearly available. A lot of inconsistent jungle games come from breaking that route for low-certainty plays that are not backed by information.
actionables: Treat farming as your default state until a lane state, vision, or enemy reveal creates a real decision point.
After every completed action, ask whether you are still on your farm timeline or deliberately breaking it for value.
Review every early route break and label it as information-based or feeling-based.

source.title: Give Me 40 Minutes To Make You INSANE At Jungle - Diamond Jungle Coaching
source.notes: Built from Leo's framing that jungle is a timeline of default farming interrupted only by useful information.
